problem id: b06650c1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  10111110 -> 01110111
  11110010 -> 10001111
  00001100 -> 10000111
  10000000 -> 11111110
  10111100 -> 01100111
  00010100 -> 01110111
  01001001 -> 00100111
  00101001 -> 11100101

query: 10000010
predicted answer: 11101110
